title: Close The Entry Ad Modal
goal: Open The Internet entry-ad page, close the modal window, and stop after the page returns to its non-modal state.
instruction: Dismiss the entry ad modal and stop when the page is back to its normal state.
review_notes: Uses selector promotion to target the entry-ad close control, which is not part of the default candidate set before recorder canonicalization.

steps.explanation: I closed the entry ad modal so the underlying page content is available again.

action.summary: I dismissed the entry ad modal and stopped once the page returned to its non-modal state.

steps.explanation: The modal is gone now, so I am ending the task.
